description_long: This is a modern, deck-mounted faucet with a sleek, angular design and a single lever handle for water control. The body is primarily metallic with a smooth, glossy finish, and the spout extends horizontally before curving downward to direct water flow. The handle is positioned to the side of the cylindrical base, allowing for easy operation. The faucet features a two-tone color scheme, with a dark, possibly black, top surface and a lighter, metallic body. The spout is broad and flat on top, tapering at the end where water is dispensed. This fixture is suitable for installation in urban environments such as public restrooms, parks, or commercial spaces.
description: A sleek, modern faucet with a single side lever and a broad, flat spout, finished in a two-tone metallic and black color scheme.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical base, single lever handle, and the flat, wide spout extending outward.
description_view_1: Top-down angle highlighting the elongated, flat spout and the smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_2: Profile view emphasizing the vertical rise of the faucet and the side-mounted lever handle.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full length of the spout and the clean, uninterrupted back surface.
